concerns.text: Task T013 (Generate Baseline) is marked [P] (parallel-safe) but depends on T008 (Task Bank) and T005 (Runner) which are in Phase 2. While Phase 2 precedes Phase 3, T013 also implicitly requires the 'ground-truth logs' artifact from T007 to be fully written and checksummed before validation (T018) can occur. The parallel tag [P] on T013 is misleading if it implies it can run concurrently with T007 or T006, as it consumes their outputs. Furthermore, T013 generates data that T022 (US2) and T029 (US3) consume; the [P] tag on T013 is acceptable only if strictly isolated from other US1 tasks, but the description 'load task definitions from Frozen Task Bank (T008)' confirms a hard dependency on a prior phase, making the [P] tag potentially confusing regarding cross-phase parallelism.

Task T022 (Execute Degraded) consumes `data/raw/baseline_failures.json` produced by T016 (US1). However, T022 is marked [P] (parallel-safe). This is a semantic violation: T022 cannot run in parallel with T016 or any task that modifies the baseline file. The [P] tag implies no dependencies, but T022 is strictly a consumer of US1 output. It must be ordered AFTER T016 completes.

Task T029 (Apply Parser) consumes 'degraded failure analyses' which are produced by T022 (US2). T029 is marked [P]. This is a semantic violation: T029 cannot run in parallel with T022. It is a strict consumer of US2 output. The [P] tag is incorrect here as it implies independence from the US2 pipeline.

Task T030 (Re-calculate scores) depends on the output of T029 (abstracted signals). T030 is marked [P]. This is a semantic violation: T030 cannot run in parallel with T029. It is a direct consumer of the previous task's artifact.

Task T039 (Run statistical comparison) depends on the completion of T024 (US2 stats), T034 (US3 stats), and T016 (US1 stats). T039 is marked [P]. This is a semantic violation: T039 is a cross-cutting consumer that cannot run until all three user story data generation phases are complete. It cannot be parallel with the generation tasks.

Task T011 (Contract test) is marked [P] and placed in Phase 3. While tests can be written in parallel to implementation, the task description says 'Verify output schema of src/sim/trajectory_generator.py'. If T013 (implementation) has not started, the schema might not exist yet. However, contract tests often define the schema first. The [P] tag is acceptable if interpreted as 'write the test file', but the description implies verifying an existing file. Clarify if this is 'Write test' or 'Run test'. If 'Run test', it must be after T013.
